remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select a player to lose 7 life

params.TriggerDescription: Eminence — Whenever another nontoken Wizard you control enters, if CARDNAME is in the command zone or on the battlefield, you may pay {1}. If you do, create a token that's a copy of that Wizard. The token gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step.

Eminence — Whenever another nontoken Wizard you control enters, if CARDNAME is in the command zone or on the battlefield, you may pay {1}. If you do, create a token that's a copy of that Wizard. The token gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step.
